---
title: "LP_WEA"
---

```{r}
#| cache = FALSE
knitr::read_chunk('Mapcode.r')
```

```{r, Loadpackages, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
```


```{r,echo=FALSE}
library(leaflet)
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
library(leaflegend)
```

```{r,echo=FALSE}
library(htmltools)
```

```{r, Loaddata8, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
```

```{r, Loadmap8}
```

```{r, LoadTable8}
```
